FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class PolylineStrokeEl

Namespace
FluentGpu.Dsl
Assembly
FluentGpu.Dsl.dll

A text run. FontFamily selects the face — a system family name ("Segoe UI", "Segoe Fluent Icons") or a custom file as "path/to.ttf#Family Name" (the WinUI syntax). Null = the theme body font. Combine with an icon-font family + a private-use glyph to render icons (see Ui.Icon).

public sealed record PolylineStrokeEl : Element, IEquatable<Element>, IEquatable<PolylineStrokeEl>

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
